name: Another Toffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter a square pan, 9x9x2 inches.
2. Spread pecans in the pan.
3. Heat sugar and butter to boiling, stirring constantly.
4. Boil over medium heat for 7 minutes, stirring constantly.
5. Immediately spread mixture evenly over nuts in the pan.
6. Sprinkle chocolate pieces over hot mixture; place baking sheet over pan so contained heat will melt the chocolate.
7. Spread melted chocolate evenly over the candy.
8. While still hot, cut into squares.
9. Chill until firm. Makes 3 dozen.
